title: Weekly Product Standup
transcript: We reviewed the landing page launch. Sarah will update the hero section by Friday. Marc approved the new pricing copy. Alice will send the final screenshots after the design review.
expected_summary: Review of landing page launch and next steps.
expected_decisions: Pricing copy approved; hero section update confirmed.
expected_action_items: Sarah updates hero section by Friday | Alice sends final screenshots after design review

title: Client Onboarding Review
transcript: The client wants the onboarding form simplified. Thomas will remove the optional fields. Nadia will check if the legal disclaimer needs updating. Paul said the form should be ready before next Monday.
expected_summary: Client onboarding form simplification was discussed.
expected_action_items: Thomas removes optional fields | Nadia checks legal disclaimer update
expected_risks_blockers: Possible delay if legal review is needed

title: Marketing Campaign Sync
transcript: We agreed to launch the campaign on May 20. Emma will prepare the email draft. Karim will validate the tracking links. Lea will confirm the budget with finance.
expected_summary: Campaign launch timing and execution tasks were confirmed.
expected_action_items: Emma prepares email draft | Karim validates tracking links | Lea confirms budget with finance
expected_open_questions: Whether the partner banner is approved

title: Support Escalation Meeting
transcript: A major customer reported login issues. Omar will investigate the error logs today. Julie will reply to the customer with an update. Ines will check if other accounts are affected.
expected_summary: Login issue escalation was reviewed and assigned.
expected_decisions: Omar investigates logs; customer update will be sent.
expected_action_items: Omar investigates error logs today | Julie sends customer update | Ines checks impact on other accounts

title: Internal Ops Review
transcript: We discussed the invoice process. Chloe will automate the reminder email. Lina will verify the payment status for overdue invoices. Hugo will document the new process in Notion.
expected_decisions: Reminder automation approved; process documentation planned.
expected_action_items: Chloe automates reminder email | Lina verifies overdue payments | Hugo documents process in Notion
expected_open_questions: Whether auto-reminders should include late fees
expected_risks_blockers: Manual invoice tracking is still slow

title: Engineering Planning
transcript: The API refactor is still in progress. Leo will finish the authentication module by Wednesday. Sofia will review the new endpoint naming convention. Max will update the release timeline after the code review.
expected_summary: API refactor progress and release planning were reviewed.
expected_action_items: Leo finishes auth module by Wednesday | Sofia reviews endpoint naming | Max updates release timeline

title: Sales Pipeline Review
transcript: The team agreed to prioritize enterprise leads. Julien will clean up the CRM records. Rania will prepare a follow-up email for the three hottest prospects. Alice will check whether the demo deck needs updating.
expected_summary: Enterprise leads will be prioritized in the pipeline.
expected_action_items: Julien cleans CRM records | Rania prepares follow-up email | Alice checks demo deck update
expected_open_questions: Which demo version should be used

title: Hiring Sync
transcript: We reviewed the shortlist for the PM role. Emma will schedule the second interviews. Nora will prepare the interview scorecard. Pierre will send the candidate feedback summary after each interview.
expected_summary: Interview process for the PM role was organized.
expected_action_items: Emma schedules second interviews | Nora prepares scorecard | Pierre sends feedback summary
expected_open_questions: Whether the final interview panel needs another member

title: Finance Checkpoint
transcript: We compared forecast versus actual spending. Claire will update the budget sheet. David will flag the variance in marketing spend. Sami will prepare a short note for leadership explaining the gap.
expected_summary: Budget variance review and reporting tasks were assigned.
expected_decisions: Variance explanation will be shared with leadership.
expected_action_items: Claire updates budget sheet | David flags marketing variance | Sami prepares leadership note
expected_open_questions: Whether costs can be reduced this quarter

title: Training Program Review
transcript: The onboarding training needs to be shorter. Theo will cut the first module in half. Maya will add a quick quiz at the end. Benoit will test the revised flow with two new hires.
expected_summary: Training flow simplification and testing were discussed.
expected_action_items: Theo shortens first module | Maya adds quiz | Benoit tests revised flow with new hires
expected_open_questions: Whether the quiz should be mandatory
expected_risks_blockers: New hires may still find the flow too long
